Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates and sends the AI-generated marketing email via HubSpot Marketing Email API to targeted contact lists.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates daily marketing email content including subject lines, body copy, and product recommendations specific to DFC's brand voice.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and distributes the AI-generated email through HubSpot Marketing Email API to DFC contact lists.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, order info, and issue descriptions.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and severity, then drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with AI-generated classification tags and attaches the drafted reply for agent review and sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow within HubSpot, giving agents a one-click path from AI draft to customer response.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Retrieves Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates all Amazon return and issue data from HubSpot into a single extraction pipeline, eliminating manual export work.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs extracted issue and return data into a structured Google Sheet for team analysis, trend tracking, and reporting.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Provides the team with a live, always-current spreadsheet for spotting return trends, identifying recurring product issues, and making data-driven quality decisions.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures real-time buying intent from existing DFC customers, enabling the sales team to strike while interest is high.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Provides a customer-facing AI chat experience on the R1 Concepts website to answer product questions, check order status, and guide purchases.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Offers 24/7 instant customer support, reducing support ticket volume and improving customer satisfaction during the shopping experience.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Processes customer inquiries using AI and connects to backend systems for order data, product catalogs, and support workflows (integrations in development).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will deliver accurate, personalized responses by pulling live data from inventory and order systems, reducing manual support load significantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover potential content creators across platforms and blogs.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net to find creators beyond major platforms, uncovering niche influencers that competitors may overlook.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and content samples from YouTube, Instagram, and Google search results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with quantitative data, enabling informed evaluation rather than guesswork-based outreach.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates discovered creator data, filters for relevance, and produces a ranked shortlist of potential creator partners.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Automates hours of manual research into a structured, AI-curated discovery list, dramatically accelerating the influencer sourcing pipeline.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement rate, content quality, niche fit, and brand alignment.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective creator vetting with a consistent, data-driven scoring system that ensures only high-potential creators move to outreach.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt instructions from Google Drive to guide AI email generation.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach emails follow proven sequences and brand guidelines, maintaining consistency across all creator communications.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and collaboration offer details.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, human-sounding outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic mass emails.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to qualified creators and logs sent messages for tracking and follow-up.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the full outreach delivery and tracking process, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily without manual effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for creator replies and pulls incoming response emails along with full conversation thread history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides complete conversation context for intelligent AI-driven follow-up.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations, negotiation playbooks, and learned response patterns from Google Drive.
Creator Reponse.impact: Arms the AI with real negotiation context and proven response strategies drawn from past successful influencer partnerships.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts intelligent reply emails using learned negotiation tactics, conversation context, and previous influencer deal patterns to continue the dialogue.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator and updates the conversation thread for continuity.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains rapid response times to creator replies, keeping engagement momentum high and reducing deal cycle time.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify eligible products.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Produces consistent, error-free load sheets every week without manual formatting, saving the team from repetitive spreadsheet assembly.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the weekly Must Have Monday email in HubSpot, attaching the generated sales sheet and load sheet.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Ensures MHM promotional emails go out on schedule every Monday with accurate, up-to-date product data, driving consistent dealer engagement.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Posts a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the load sheet was generated and the email was sent.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team informed of weekly MHM status without requiring manual check-ins or email threads.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for First to Market product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email content in seconds instead of hours of manual copywriting, accelerating time-to-market for new product promotions.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including email performance, contact growth, and campaign engagement data from HubSpot.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes keyword gaps and competitor ranking opportunities by reviewing current search performance and identifying underserved keyword targets.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors the designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen, detecting the weekly Super Session Saturday asset.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly search performance data for DFC blog pages including impressions, clicks, average position, and query rankings.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor fitment data against DFC's existing parts inventory to identify overlaps, gaps, and potential new product opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where market gaps exist, giving Dino a clear roadmap for product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to targeted contacts to gather demand data and interest signals for two-piece rotor fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to inventory decisions, replacing guesswork with real customer feedback collected at scale.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a comprehensive, decision-ready catalog document that consolidates weeks of research into one organized output, enabling faster go/no-go decisions on new SKUs.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every active creative including headlines, descriptions, and CTA fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility into every live ad's copy across platforms, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns and ad sets.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases or terms, identifies exact matches, and compiles a detailed report noting the campaign, ad, field, and full copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across hundreds of ads in seconds, preventing costly policy violations or brand inconsistencies.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the flagged list to the requesting team member with a structured breakdown of every match, organized by platform, campaign, and specific ad field.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requester's inbox on demand, enabling immediate remediation without waiting for manual review cycles.
